title: Bhagavad Gita: As It Is
description: A comprehensive study of the Bhagavad Gita with practical application for daily life. Covers all 18 chapters.

title: Japa Meditation Mastery
description: Master the art of Japa chanting. Learn proper pronunciation, counting, and deepening your meditation practice.

title: Srimad Bhagavatam Intro
description: An introduction to the Srimad Bhagavatam — the ripened fruit of Vedic literature.

title: Kirtan & Devotional Music
description: Learn to play mridanga and harmonium, and lead kirtan in your local community.
